meta.title: Writer - AI-Powered Text Enhancement
meta.description: Enhance your writing anywhere in your browser. From casual chats to professional emails, Lubb Writer helps you communicate with clarity and confidence.

hero.title: AI-Powered
hero.description: Enhance your writing anywhere in your browser. From casual chats to professional emails, Lubb Writer helps you communicate with clarity and confidence.

items.title: Smart Enhancement
items.description: Instantly improve your text with AI-powered suggestions that maintain your original meaning.

items.title: Multiple Modes
items.description: Choose from Humanize, Formal, Casual, Shorten, Expand, and more to match your needs.

items.title: Privacy First
items.description: Your text is sent only to your configured API. No central servers, no data collection.

items.title: Works Everywhere
items.description: Enhance text in any text field across any website. Twitter, email, docs, and more.

items.title: Floating Inline Icon
items.description: A smart icon appears when you select text. Click to enhance instantly without opening the popup.

items.title: Lightning Fast
items.description: Get enhanced text in seconds with our optimized AI processing pipeline.

items.title: Beautiful Design
items.description: Enjoy a clean, modern interface that looks great in both light and dark modes.

items.title: Humanize
items.description: Make your text sound natural and conversational

items.title: Formal
items.description: Convert casual text to professional language

items.title: Casual
items.description: Make formal text more friendly and relaxed

items.title: Shorten
items.description: Condense your text while keeping the key points

items.title: Expand
items.description: Elaborate on your ideas with more detail

items.title: Rewrite
items.description: Rephrase while maintaining the original meaning

items.title: Grammar Fix
items.description: Correct spelling, grammar, and punctuation errors

items.title: Summarize
items.description: Create concise summaries of longer texts

step1.title: Choose Your Browser
step1.description: Available for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge

step2.title: Add to Browser
step2.description: Click "Add to Browser" in your extension store

step3.title: Configure API
step3.description: Enter your API token in settings to get started

usage.title: How to Use the Extension
usage.intro: Using the Writer browser extension is simple and intuitive. Enhance your text directly from any webpage in three easy steps.

steps.title: Select Text
steps.description: Select any text on any webpage that you want to enhance or rewrite.

steps.title: Click Enhance
steps.description: Click the Writer extension icon that appears or use the inline enhancement button.

steps.title: Copy Results
steps.description: Review the enhanced text and copy it to your clipboard with one click.

selfHosting.title: Self-Hosting the API Backend
selfHosting.intro: Deploy your own Writer API server for complete data privacy. Your text never leaves your infrastructure — full control, full privacy.

features.title: Complete Privacy
features.description: Your text never leaves your infrastructure. Full data sovereignty.

features.title: Docker Ready
features.description: One-command deployment with Docker and Docker Compose.

features.title: Custom Providers
features.description: Connect up to 10 custom OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

prerequisites.title: 1. Prerequisites
prerequisites.description: Ensure you have Docker and Docker Compose installed on your system.

envFile.title: 2. Create Environment File
envFile.description: Copy the example environment file and configure your settings:
envFile.code:
cd api
cp .env.example .env
nano .env  # Edit with your settings

startContainer.title: 3. Start the Container
startContainer.description: Launch the API server with Docker Compose:
startContainer.code:
docker-compose up -d
docker-compose ps  # Verify it's running

configureExtension.title: 4. Configure the Extension
configureExtension.description: Point Writer to your self-hosted API:
configureExtension.code:
API Endpoint: http://localhost:3001
API Token: (from your .env)

official.title: Official Providers
items: OpenAI - GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini
Anthropic - Claude 3.5 Sonnet, Claude 3 Opus
Google - Gemini 1.5 Flash, Gemini 1.5 Pro

custom.title: Custom OpenAI-Compatible Endpoints (up to 10)
items: MiniMax - MiniMax-M2.1 models
Ollama - Local LLM inference (Llama2, Mistral, Qwen, etc.)
LM Studio - Local model serving
LocalAI - Self-hosted AI gateway
Any OpenAI-compatible API - Flexible custom endpoints

security.title: Security Best Practices
items: Use a strong API_TOKEN to protect your API
Keep your .env file secure and never commit it to version control
Use HTTPS in production with a reverse proxy (nginx, Traefik)
Regularly update your Docker images for security patches

cta.title: Ready to Enhance Your Writing?
cta.description: Join thousands of users who trust Lubb Writer for their daily text enhancement needs.

preview.sampleOriginal: I think we should maybe consider potentially reaching out to them at some point.
preview.sampleEnhanced: I believe we should reach out to them soon to discuss this opportunity.

infoCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
infoCollect.intro: Lubb Writer is a privacy-first application. Here's how your data is handled:
items: Text you select: When you use the extension to enhance text, the selected text is sent to your configured API endpoint for processing. You control where this data goes.
Extension settings: Your preferences (theme, default mode, API endpoint, etc.) are stored locally in your browser.
API credentials: Your API token is stored locally in your browser and is only sent to your configured API endpoint.

howUse.title: 2. How Your Data Is Used
howUse.intro: We operate no central servers. Your text is only sent to the API endpoint you configure. We do not:
items: Receive or store any of your text data
Track your API usage or requests
Use your text for training machine learning models
Share your data with third parties
Track your browsing activity

dataRetention.title: 3. Data Retention
dataRetention.content: We retain no data. Your selected text is processed in real-time through your configured API endpoint and is never sent to our servers. Any enhancement history stored locally in your browser can be cleared at any time through the extension settings.

thirdParty.title: 4. Your API Provider
thirdParty.content: When you use a self-hosted API, your text stays within your infrastructure. When using third-party AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.), your text is sent to their services per their privacy policies. We recommend reviewing the privacy policy of your chosen AI provider.

selfHosting.title: 5. Self-Hosting
selfHosting.content: For maximum privacy, you can self-host the Writer API on your own server. When self-hosted, your text is processed entirely within your infrastructure and never leaves your control.

cookies.title: 6. Cookies
cookies.content: Lubb Writer does not use cookies. All data is stored locally in your browser's storage.

security.title: 7. Security
security.intro: Your data security depends on your configuration. We recommend:
items: Using a strong API token for your endpoint
Self-hosting the API for complete data control
Using HTTPS for your API endpoint in production
Keeping your browser and extensions up to date

yourRights.title: 8. Your Rights
yourRights.intro: You have complete control over your data:
items: Access: View your settings at any time through the extension popup
Delete: Remove enhancement history and settings through the extension
Control: Choose your API provider and endpoint
Own: With self-hosting, your data never leaves your infrastructure

childrenPrivacy.title: 9. Children's Privacy
childrenPrivacy.content: Lubb Writer is not intended for use by children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 13.

changes.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. We will notify users of any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.

contact.title: 11. Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, please contact us:
items: Email: contact@adelpro.us.kg
GitHub: Create an issue in our repository (https://github.com/adelpro/lubb-writer)
